package rulecoverage

func NegativeConfigFileReadPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "config_file_read_per_request"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`os.ReadFile(\"config.json\")` or `viper.ReadInConfig()` inside handler or loop code"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
